name: Bidworx
headline: Evidence-backed bid intelligence for teams that cannot afford unsupported claims.
summary: Bidworx is an operational procurement intelligence platform that analyses tenders, buyer requirements, compliance risks, scoring signals, and evidence coverage before a team commits to a bid response.
core_strengths: Maps buyer requirements to approved evidence
Scores bid readiness with deterministic rules
Structures tender intelligence into decision-ready outputs
Keeps refusal behaviour scoped when evidence is missing
availability_summary: Use Bidworx when a tender, RFP, framework call-off, or buyer question needs evidence-backed analysis before the team writes or submits a response.
contact_cta: Start by analysing a tender opportunity, then capture missing evidence, compliance risks, and submission actions.
stack_highlight: Structured procurement data + deterministic scoring + streamed evidence-backed answers

engagement_options.description: Parse buyer requirements, mandatory criteria, scoring hints, and submission constraints.
Match claims to approved proof points, case examples, policies, and source categories.
Flag missing declarations, certifications, formatting rules, attachments, and pass/fail risks.
Produce deterministic opportunity scores with transparent weighted dimensions.

custom_services.name: Opportunity triage
custom_services.description: Rapid go/no-go intelligence for tender opportunities, including risk, fit, evidence coverage, and next actions.

custom_services.name: Submission readiness review
custom_services.description: Checks buyer requirements, mandatory documents, evidence gaps, and unsupported claims before submission.

custom_services.name: Evidence library setup
custom_services.description: Structures approved proof points, policies, case examples, accreditations, and reusable bid evidence.

pricing_notes: Commercial packaging is a placeholder for the MVP. The product architecture is ready for tender analysis, evidence mapping, and bid readiness scoring.
